name: Neighborhood Station Names
author: pendulating
description: The mod introduces three behaviors: a toggle (in settings menu, no new top-right button) , "Name stations by neighborhood," which switches neighborhood-based naming on or off (on by default); a button, "Rename existing stations by neighborhood," which re-applies neighborhood names to every station already on the map; and automatic naming, which labels each new station as we place it in blueprint mode or construct it, whenever the toggle is on.
